data.title: Why Blockchain Privacy And Surveillance Will Define The Next Era Of Crypto Regulation
data.description:
The global conversation around digital assets is shifting from speculative market cycles to deeper questions about blockchain surveillance, compliance and the future of privacy. As regulators intensify their focus on how cryptocurrency transactions are monitored, the stakes are rising for investors, builders and platforms that rely on decentralized technologies.

data.title: Florida AG announces recovery of $1.5M crypto for local victim
data.description:
Florida’s Attorney General James Uthmeier has announced the seizure of approximately $1. 5 million in cryptocurrency assets linked to an investment scam in Citrus County. The seizure occurred under the Fugitive Disentitlement Act, which allows authorities to confiscate assets from individuals who are fugitives from justice. The recovery comes as Florida lawmakers are proposing new regulations […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/florida-recover-crypto-for-local-victim/

data.title: Bitcoin To Hit $150,000 By 2026, Treasury President Predicts
data.description:
A Bitcoin Standard Treasury Company (BSTR) executive has predicted that Bitcoin will reach $150k by the end of 2026, citing a confluence of regulatory clarity, monetary easing, and Wall Street adoption. The forecast arrives even as Bitcoin is trading about 28% below its all-time high. BTC is currently trading at approximately $90,180, down about 0. 59% […]
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/bitcoin-to-hit-150k-by-2026-treasury-president-says/

data.title: BitGo Among Five Digital Asset Firms to Receive National Bank Charters
data.description:

source: https://www.nftgators.com/bitgo-among-five-digital-asset-firms-to-receive-national-bank-charters/

data.title: Top prediction markets form coalition to fight back against lobby groups
data.description:
Major prediction market platforms, including Kalshi and Coinbase, have formed a coalition as a coordinated response to state casino regulators trying to flex their authority on prediction markets. The regulators claim that these new markets are unlawful betting platforms. Kalshi, Coinbase, Crypto. com, and other prediction market platforms have entered into a coalition to defend federal […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/prediction-markets-form-coalition/
